recipe.title: Barbecue Pizza
recipe.instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Place pizza crust on a baking sheet. Evenly spread pizza sauce on crust. Top with cheese. In a separate bowl mix barbecue meat and sauce. Spread barbecue mixture on toip of cheese. Top with onion rings, as desired. Bake in oven for 10-12 minutes until cheese bubbles.
recipe.summary: If you want to add more Barbecue recipes to your recipe box, Barbecue Pizza might be a recipe you should try.
